subcodes.first_line: We have, verily, lit the Lamp, while mankind remaineth in wondrous darkness. Have they become distant through that which was forbidden them? Nay, rather through that which they have wrought, O ye who are endued with understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اوقدنا النبراس و الناس فی ظلمه عجاب هل بعدوا بما منعوا بل بما اکتسبوا یا اولی الالباب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @personal instructions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
